bird.name: Giant white-eye
bird.summary: The giant white-eye, or Palau greater white-eye (Megazosterops palauensis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is monotypic…

relations.subject: Giant white-eye
relations.evidence: The species is currently classified as Near Threatened by the IUCN due to likely habitat loss and the possibility of the establishment of the invasive Brown tree snake on the island.The Giant White-eye is13-14cm large
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Giant white-eye
relations.evidence: Changing weather patterns because of climate change may also threaten the species in the future
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
